pulp — Pulp audio plugin framework CLI

Usage: pulp <command> [options]

Commands:
  build          Configure and build the project
  run            Launch a standalone Pulp application
  test           Run the test suite
  status         Show project status and info
  create         Scaffold a new plugin project
  validate       Run plugin format validators
  doctor         Diagnose environment issues
  ship           Sign, package, and distribute
  design         Launch the AI design tool
  docs           Browse local documentation
  clean          Remove build directory
  cache          Manage SDK and asset cache
  audio          Repo-level audio model and bundle tooling
  sdk            Manage the Pulp SDK installation
  upgrade        Update the CLI to the latest version
  version        Show, bump, or check version info
  dev            Unified dev loop: watch, build, test, run
  scan           Scan system paths for VST3 / AU / CLAP / LV2 plug-ins
  host           Load a plug-in and run a synthetic audio block through it
  pr             One-shot push-a-PR: gates + bump + ship
  projects       Manage the ~/.pulp/projects.json registry
  project        Per-project SDK pin: bump, undo
  config         Read or write ~/.pulp/config.toml settings

  ci-local       Local-first CI across configured hosts
  design-debug   Headless design debug runner
  inspect        Launch the component inspector
  import-design  Import designs from Figma/Stitch/v0/Pencil
  export-tokens  Export theme as W3C Design Tokens
  audit          License and clean-room audit
  add            Add a component to the project
  help           Show this help

Examples:
  pulp create MyPlugin              # Create a new effect plugin
  pulp create MySynth --type instrument  # Create an instrument
  pulp doctor             # Check environment for issues
  pulp build              # Build all targets
  pulp test               # Run all tests
  pulp validate           # Validate built plugins
  pulp docs index         # List available docs
  pulp status             # Show project info
